title: mondayDB timeline
excerpt:
Is there an update about the timeline published last year? 
I’m waiting anxiously for 2.0 so we can start using large scale boards. 
Thank you!

posts.author: einavpeleg (Einav Peleg)
posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: shayan.moussawi (Shayan Moussawi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Large scale Boards are already being rolled out to specific accounts. I believe some already have them.

Btw. in case anyone is interested: The formula column in automations is scheduled for September 2024 according to Mondays Investor Pres.

posts.author: einavpeleg (Einav Peleg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks @shayan.moussawi

Is it official information?
Should I ask the support?
